reasoning: High concentration of anomalies on the F1-u (User Plane) interface, including packet loss and high latency, which led to symptomatic degradation on other interfaces (E2, F1-c).
actionable_steps:
1. Perform a physical layer check on the transport network connecting the O-CU and O-DU to identify cable faults or hardware failures.
2. Inspect the transport network for congestion or suboptimal routing causing packet loss and latency.
3. Verify the MTU settings and interface configurations on both the O-CU and O-DU to ensure consistency and prevent fragmentation.
